title: Penalties
doc_html:
§288.  Penalties

Whoever violates any of the provisions of R.S. 42:283 through R.S. 42:287 shall be fined one thousand dollars or imprisoned for six months or both.
doc_text:
§288.  Penalties
Whoever violates any of the provisions of R.S. 42:283 through R.S. 42:287 shall be fined one thousand dollars or imprisoned for six months or both.
